name: Bill Pope
biography:
Bill Pope, A.S.C. (born June 19, 1952) is an American cinematographer known for collaborating with directors Sam Raimi, The Wachowskis and Edgar Wright. He has also photographed and directed numerous music videos for artists like Chris Isaak, Metallica and Drake, and eight episodes of the documentary series Cosmos: A Spacetime Odyssey.
